usage: reportUnalignedNets [-help] [-alignDistance <float>] [-alignFeedThruPins] [-considerMacroPinWithinDistance <float>] [-ignoreLength <float>] [-noHighlight] [-reportAllWithinChannelWidth <float>] [-rptFile <string>] [-statistics] [-steinerBox] [-verbose] [[ -ptnToPtn {aligned unaligned layerMismatch samePtn nonNbr multiFanout all unplaced none} ] [ -topToPtn {aligned unaligned layerMismatch samePtn nonNbr multiFanout all unplaced none} ]] [ -pin_file <fileName> | -exclude_pin_file <fileName> ]

options.name: -alignDistance
options.description: assumes pins are aligned upto specified distance (in microns) eventhough they are not phycially aligned.

options.name: -alignFeedThruPins
options.description: Report deviation of partition pins from chain's source-target box.

options.name: -considerMacroPinWithinDistance
options.description: Reports nets connected to macro-pin which are within specified distance from nearest partition boundary.

options.name: -exclude_pin_file
options.description: Specify pin-list to be excluded for partition in a file

options.name: -ignoreLength
options.description: Does not report nets with length more than ignoreLength.

options.name: -pin_file
options.description: Specify pin-list for partition in a file

options.name: -ptnToPtn
options.description: {aligned unaligned layerMismatch samePtn nonNbr multiFanout all unplaced none} Reports nets that have 2 pins on 2 different partitions and/or clones and are not connected to top level hard-macro,std cell,or I/O.

options.name: -reportAllWithinChannelWidth
options.description: Report all unaligned nets within specified channel width

options.name: -statistics
options.description: Report average misalignment with standard deviation and layer difference count for aligned, layerMismatch and unaligned ptnToPtn 2-pin nets of partitions.

options.name: -steinerBox
options.description: Report deviation of partition pins from connectivity box of the partition.

options.name: -topToPtn
options.description: {aligned unaligned layerMismatch samePtn nonNbr multiFanout all unplaced none} Reports nets that have one pin connected to top level hard-macro or I/O and other pin connected to a partition or a clone.

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Reports all categories in log file.
